content.en:
Before the big formation.

Ye Tian gathered his strength and bombarded the large array with a powerful sword dao divine power.

He doesn't often use kendo supernatural powers, and even if he is exposed, others won't think of him.

The defense of the Great Array was not strong, and there was no need for him to use Eternal Fire Extinguishing and other means.

Boom!!!

A hole appeared in the big array, the formation enchantment was blasted, and Ye Tian instantly entered the big array.

Meanwhile.

The Heavenly Monarchs of the Demon Sound Sect who were guarding the Ten Star Sea noticed it one by one, and they were extremely angry.

"Oh no, someone broke into the secret place!"

Phantom Heavenly Monarch and the other Heavenly Monarchs hurriedly opened the Star Great Array and rushed towards the Ten Star Sea at the fastest speed.

They know what is in the secret place, and if they lose it, something big will happen!

Even if their status in the Demon Sound Sect is not low, they will have to endure huge punishments.

Inside the Great Array.

As soon as Ye Tian came in, he saw that there were crystals emitting the light of the stars on the bottom of the sea in this area.

"Star Crystal !!"

Ye Tian's expression changed greatly.

Star Crystal is an extremely precious material, far superior to Star Sand.

Xingchen Sand can be used to refine weapons, and it can also be used to set up formations, and even some strong people who cultivate special Xingchen physique also need Xingchen Sand.

Because of this, the value of Xingchen Sand is very high, and just one catty requires a Void Heaven Points.

However, the value of Xingchen Crystal is far above Xingchen Sand, and in the Void Sky Points System, Xingchen Crystal is in a state of price and no stock.

A star crystal the size of a little thumb is worth more than 10,000 points, and a fist-sized star crystal is probably worth close to 1 million points.

Its main function is to refine Dao weapons, and it can also be used to assist in cultivating special physiques, such as some powerful star physiques that want to break through the shackles and reach a higher level, they also need star crystals, and star sand has no effect.

In the whole chaos, the Star Crystal has always been very lacking, and even the Void Heaven Vein is seriously lacking the Star Crystal, it is one of the most practical but rare treasures.

But there are dense star crystals here, no less than tens of thousands!

And the smallest one is the size of a fist, and the largest is probably already a man tall.

With so many star crystals, how valuable they are!

"Only with 100 million can we describe the value of these star crystals!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

However, what shocked Ye Tian even more was that it was at the very central seabed of this sea area, where a ball the size of a basketball was suspended, it was a little illusory, constantly absorbing the surrounding energy, and it seemed that it was still in gestation, not completely conceived.

Seeing it, Ye Tian's pupils shrank sharply.

"Xingchen Dzi! The supreme treasure that even the Dao Ancestor has to snatch in the legend, once it is refined, it can achieve the supreme treasure of the supreme body of the stars, a Dao weapon worth one piece!"

Ye Tian's heart was moved, and he couldn't wait to take it away.

But he couldn't take it away, not to mention that the Star Dzi hadn't been conceived yet, and even if it was conceived, he couldn't take it away.

I don't know how many times the difficulty of taking the Xingchen Dzi is many times that of the Xingchen Sand, with his current cultivation and the Starlight Extermination Hand, he can't even shake the Xingchen Dzi.

Even if he wanted to take away the Star Crystal, it was more difficult, and it was very difficult to take this thing.

Otherwise, the Demon Sound Sect would not let these Star Crystals be here, and if they could take them, they would have taken them a long time ago.

"Although my Starlight Extermination Technique hasn't cultivated much, but now that it has advanced to the Xiaocheng realm, I may be able to take some Star Crystals!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

Immediately, he began to cast the Starlight Extermination Technique, covering hundreds of Star Crystals at once.

Rumble!!!!

Xingchen Crystal did not shake!

"No, it's unrealistic to take so many star crystals at once, take less!"

Ye Tian controlled the range of the Starlight Extermination Hand, covering twenty Star Crystals, and finally shook these Star Crystals at once.

"Time, I need time!"

Ye Tian urged Xingchen Jing with all his strength, and roared in his heart.

However, at this time, the Heavenly Monarchs of the Demon Sound Sect had already arrived.

They wanted to enter this secret place and stop Ye Tian.

"Who the hell are you, dare to break into the secret place of our Demon Sound Sect, you are dead!"

The voice of the Phantom Celestial Monarch came in.

Thundered!!!!

The void is blocked, and the stars are suppressed.

The Heavenly Monarchs of the Demon Sound Sect blocked this area, did not allow Ye Tian to escape, and even isolated the power of cause and effect, time and space, and so on, one of the means of such isolation, it was unrealistic to send out the message.

This is also one of the methods prepared by the Demon Sound Sect in advance, for fear that someone will discover the Star Crystal and Star Bead in the secret place, thus exposing the secret.

As long as the message can't get out, and they kill the intruder, the secret here can't be revealed.

......

"You can't hide your identity unless you leave now!"

Ye Tian hesitated.

But as soon as he saw so many star crystals, he didn't think about it anymore.

"Expose your identity, expose your identity, if I get enough Xingchen Crystal, I can improve my strength in a short period of time, and I will not be afraid of anyone at that time!"

Ye Tiandao.

Rumble!!!!

The Blood River Immortal Spell unfolded, and a river of blood covered the secret land, not allowing other Heavenly Monarchs to enter.

Now, the information of Ye Tian's Blood River Immortal Technique has been leaked a long time ago, and it was leaked by the Heavenly Fire Sect at the beginning, so the Blood River Immortal Technique is also one of Ye Tian's famous chaotic powers.

As soon as the Heavenly Monarchs of the Heavenly Fire Sect saw the Blood River Immortal Technique, they recognized Ye Tian.

"Blood River Immortal Technique, you are the Son of Ten Thousand Laws!" The Phantom Sound Heavenly Monarch frowned, this is the terrifying Heavenly Monarch who is ranked 13th on the Heavenly Monarch List, they are not opponents at all.

If Ye Tian made a move, they would decide that they would die.

For a moment, they hesitated.

"Phantom sound, Wanfa Daozi is collecting Xingchen Crystal, he can shake Xingchen Crystal!"

A Heavenly Monarch performed the Pupil Technique, and his eyes looked through the blood river and saw the scene of Ye Tian receiving the Star Crystal.

"What, the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi can collect Star Crystals, damn it, he will have a star-like Chaos Divine Power!!!" The Phantom Sound Heavenly Monarch was furious.

The value of the Star Crystal is so high, even if it loses one, the Demon Sound Sect can be regarded as a heavy loss.

"No matter how powerful the Star Chaos Divine Power of the Ten Thousand Law Dao is, it will take time to collect the Star Crystal, wait for the other Heavenly Monarchs to arrive, and then besiege and kill him!"

The Phantom Sound Heavenly Monarch sent a message to the other Heavenly Monarchs, Dao.

Not long after, a heavenly monarch descended.

The Demon Sound Sect is not a small force, it is also a powerful force with several Dao Ancestors in the chaos, it is not weaker than the Void Heaven One Pulse in the slightest, and even at the Heavenly Monarch level, the Demon Sound Sect can also suppress the Void Heaven One Pulse a little, and it is also one of the biggest competitors of the Void Sky One Pulse.

This time, one of the Heavenly Monarchs who arrived from the Demon Sound Sect included four or five Heavenly Monarch List Heavenly Monarchs, and the most powerful one of them was a half-step True Spirit Realm powerhouse, and it was a half-step True Spirit powerhouse who had been promoted from the Heavenly Monarch List to a dozen or so - Baili Heavenly Monarch!

Baili Tianjun is already a half-step true spirit, although it is not a real true spirit, but it must be able to achieve a true spirit, so now it is also called Baili Zhenjun.

"Lord Baili Zhenjun, the enemy is the Dao of Ten Thousand Laws!"

Phantom Sound Heavenly Monarch reported.

"What, it's the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi!" Baili Zhenjun was shocked.

This is known as the Heavenly Monarch and no one can kill the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi, and his life-saving ability is very strong.

"Even if he is a master of the Ten Thousand Laws Dao and dares to steal the Star Crystal of our Demon Sound Sect, he must die!"

Baili Zhenjun made a move and slammed into Ye Tian with a punch.

Thundered!!!!

The river of blood was pierced and hit Ye Tian's body directly.

But Ye Tian relied on the Blood River Immortal Technique and many other defensive divine powers to resist one by one.

Seeing this scene, many Heavenly Monarchs of the Demon Sound Sect were shocked.

That's Baili Zhenjun, his strength is much stronger than Ye Tian, and he didn't even manage to break Ye Tian's defense!

"Attack together!"

Baili Zhenjun ordered: "If we let go of the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi, our Demon Yin Sect will not be able to protect the Ten Mile Sea, and the Dao Ancestor will be furious!"

"Yes!"

Many heavenly monarchs answered.

One Heavenly Monarch made a move, including several other weaker half-step True Spirit powerhouses who also made a move.

There were hundreds of Heavenly Monarchs here, and the power of their actions shook the entire Ten Mile Sea, and the huge Ten Mile Sea seemed to be about to shatter.

However, the Ten Mile Sea can give birth to Star Crystals and Star Dzi, which is naturally not a simple ocean, and it can easily defend against the attacks of many strong people.

Under the siege of so many Heavenly Monarchs and half-step true spirits, Ye Tian was injured, and his defenses were indeed broken, but relying on the characteristics of immortality and immortality, Ye Tian persevered.

Several Heavenly Monarchs wanted to enter the secret land and drive Ye Tian out of the secret land.

But as soon as they came in, Ye Tian launched the Eternal Immortal Fire Extinguisher.

Wow!!!

Several Heavenly Monarchs were shrouded in eternal immortality and began to burn.

"Ahh!!!hh

With a burst of screams, several powerful Heavenly Monarchs fell one after another, including a half-step True Spirit and a Heavenly Monarch Bang Heavenly Monarch.

"It's not good, he will never extinguish the fire, and it is the eternal immortality of the consummation realm!"

Baili Zhenjun reminded.

After the tragic scene just now, the other Heavenly Monarchs did not dare to get close to Ye Tian anymore, but attacked from afar, preparing to consume Ye Tian to death.

"Whoever is about to be promoted to a half-step true spirit, give me a breakthrough immediately!"

Baili Zhenjun ordered.

Immediately, dozens of Heavenly Monarchs led by the Phantom Sound Heavenly Monarch chose to break through on the spot.

Bang!!!!

A stream of aura belonging to the half-step True Spirit Realm erupted, and one by one they condensed the True Spirit in a short period of time, and their strength skyrocketed, and they immediately joined the battle group and besieged Ye Tian.

Under such circumstances, Ye Tian was under tremendous pressure, and his body was blown up again and again.

As time passed, Ye Tian's injuries became more and more serious.

At this time, he had no way to communicate to others, so he could only rely on himself.

On this day half a month later, Ye Tian was pleasantly surprised, he finally received the twenty star crystals.

"Go on!"

Ye Tian said greedily.
